creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 159141
Update LICENSE and add RESTRICTED.

Now Standard edition of RainLoop Webmail is covered under "RainLoop Software License", which is proprietary and restrictive one. Therefore

* Update LICENSE* in Makefile
* Add RESTRICTED in Makefile and add entry to LEGAL because redistribution in any form is prohibited as following:

> 5. You may not sell, redistribute or offer for download any of our products in any form or in any medium, whether original or modified or for profit or not.
